reasoning: Multiple sources up to October 2025 confirm that Google Chrome maintains a commanding lead in the global browser market share, typically holding around 65% to 68% of the market. Safari is the closest competitor at around 14% to 18%. The resolution is evaluated based on the "Usage share of all browsers" table from Wikipedia at the end of 2025. Given that the knowledge cutoff is early November 2025, it is practically impossible for any other browser to close a ~50-point gap in less than two months. Therefore, I am assigning the maximum allowable confidence of 98% that Chrome will remain the most popular browser at the end of 2025.
